sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11946" key="a)perissotru/fhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπερισσοτρύφητος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n11946.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not luxuriously fed,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀϊζύς</foreign> Timo <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
